diagrams.name: agent_run_lifecycle
diagrams.title: Agent Run Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Core agent run loop from invocation through turn execution to final output, including max-turns guard and early exit conditions

diagrams.name: single_agent_turn_execution
diagrams.title: Single Agent Turn Execution
diagrams.description: Processing one turn: build prompt, call model, receive response, decide next action (tool call, handoff, or final answer)

diagrams.name: tool_execution_pipeline
diagrams.title: Tool Execution Pipeline
diagrams.description: Batch tool invocation: fan-out execution, approval gating, result collection, error handling per tool

diagrams.name: tool_approval_flow
diagrams.title: Tool Approval Flow
diagrams.description: Human-in-the-loop approval: request approval, await decision, approve or reject tool call, handle interruptions

diagrams.name: agent_handoff_routing
diagrams.title: Agent Handoff Routing
diagrams.description: Handoff decision: identify target agent, transfer context, switch active agent, resume execution in new agent

diagrams.name: mcp_server_connection_lifecycle
diagrams.title: MCP Server Connection Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Connect all MCP servers in parallel, handle failures with retry/backoff, refresh active servers, and cleanup on shutdown

diagrams.name: mcp_server_reconnect_and_cleanup
diagrams.title: MCP Server Reconnect and Cleanup
diagrams.description: Reconnect flow after failure, refresh active server list, and full cleanup of all server connections

diagrams.name: batch_trace_processor_run
diagrams.title: Batch Trace Processor Run Loop
diagrams.description: Background thread loop: collect spans/traces into batches, export completed batches, flush on shutdown

diagrams.name: tracing_span_lifecycle
diagrams.title: Tracing Span and Trace Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Span creation, start/end events fanned out through SynchronousMultiTracingProcessor to all registered processors

diagrams.name: voice_pipeline_audio_processing
diagrams.title: Voice Pipeline Audio Processing
diagrams.description: Ingest audio input, run STT, pass transcript to agent, receive response, run TTS, output audio

diagrams.name: voice_pipeline_single_vs_multi_turn
diagrams.title: Voice Pipeline Single vs Multi-Turn Execution
diagrams.description: Decision between single-turn and multi-turn voice conversation, looping turns until end condition

diagrams.name: single_agent_voice_workflow
diagrams.title: Single Agent Voice Workflow
diagrams.description: Voice workflow run: receive transcript, invoke agent run, stream response tokens back to caller

diagrams.name: sandbox_session_lifecycle
diagrams.title: Sandbox Session Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Acquire sandbox agent, create/resume session, configure materialization, serialize state, cleanup resources

diagrams.name: sandbox_memory_generation
diagrams.title: Sandbox Memory Generation Pipeline
diagrams.description: Enqueue agent results/rollout payloads, worker processes files, runs phase-two memory synthesis, flushes output

diagrams.name: realtime_websocket_session
diagrams.title: Realtime WebSocket Session
diagrams.description: WebSocket connect, audio send, client event dispatch, tool call approve/reject, interrupt, event processing loop

diagrams.name: twilio_voice_session
diagrams.title: Twilio Voice Session Setup
diagrams.description: Twilio WebSocket connection arrival, new session creation, linking to voice pipeline

diagrams.name: research_bot_workflow
diagrams.title: Research Bot Workflow
diagrams.description: Plan search queries, fan out parallel searches, aggregate results, synthesize and write final report

diagrams.name: financial_research_workflow
diagrams.title: Financial Research Agent Workflow
diagrams.description: Form financial search queries, execute searches, collect data, generate investment report

diagrams.name: streaming_response_handling
diagrams.title: Streaming Response Handling
diagrams.description: Handle streamed chat completion chunks: accumulate tokens, detect tool calls, emit events, finalize response

diagrams.name: run_error_handling_and_recovery
diagrams.title: Run Error Handling and Recovery
diagrams.description: Catch agent run errors, invoke registered error handlers, determine recovery or re-raise, attach error data to result

diagrams.name: healthcare_workflow_hooks
diagrams.title: Healthcare Workflow Agent and Tool Hooks
diagrams.description: Lifecycle hooks fired around agent start/end and tool start/end within the healthcare support workflow

diagrams.name: temporal_workflow_snapshot_resume
diagrams.title: Temporal Workflow Snapshot and Resume
diagrams.description: Serialize agent state into WorkflowSnapshot, persist via Temporal, deserialize and resume execution after replay
